descFull: Arkon: Enterprise AI Knowledge Hub & MCP Server. Self-hosted knowledge base for teams to manage RAG contexts, access policies, and AI skills. Connect Claude and other LLMs via Model Context Protocol (MCP) for automated, secure organizational knowledge integration.
